name: semester-retention
description: Runs cohort retention analysis and equity gap analysis on a student dataset. Produces a semester-by-semester retention matrix and equity indices by demographic group. For IPEDS reporting, accreditation self-studies, and equity-minded program review.

inputs.label: Student Data (S3 path)
inputs.description: S3 URI to a CSV with columns: student_id, cohort (entry term), re_enrolled_date, demographic columns (e.g. pell_recipient, first_gen).

inputs.label: Equity Metric Column
inputs.description: Numeric outcome to measure equity gaps across (e.g. GPA, credits earned).

inputs.label: Demographic Group Columns
inputs.description: Columns defining demographic subgroups for equity gap analysis.

inputs.label: Reference Group Value
inputs.description: Value in group columns representing the reference (e.g. 'no' for non-Pell).

inputs.label: User ARN
inputs.description: AWS IAM ARN of the requesting user for budget tracking.

steps.description: Wait for retention analysis to complete
Run equity gap analysis on the same dataset
Wait for equity gap analysis to complete

outputs.description: Cohort retention matrix with attrition rates by period and group
Equity index table with group means and gap magnitude vs. reference group
